StmtSimple.StatementText: SELECT MIN(chn.name) AS voiced_char_name, MIN(n.name) AS voicing_actress_name, MIN(t.title) AS kung_fu_panda FROM job.aka_name AS an, job.char_name AS chn, job.cast_info AS ci, job.company_name AS cn, job.info_type AS it, job.keyword AS k, job.movie_companies AS mc, job.movie_info AS mi, job.movie_keyword AS mk, job.name AS n, job.role_type AS rt, job.title AS t WHERE ci.note IN ('(voice)', '(voice: Japanese version)', '(voice) (uncredited)', '(voice: English version)') AND cn.country_code ='[us]' AND cn.name = 'DreamWorks Animation' AND it.info = 'release dates' AND k.keyword IN ('hero', 'martial-arts', 'hand-to-hand-combat', 'computer-animated-movie') AND mi.info IS NOT NULL AND (mi.info LIKE 'Japan:%201%' OR mi.info LIKE 'USA:%201%') AND n.gender ='f' AND n.name LIKE '%An%' AND rt.role ='actress' AND t.production_year > 2010 AND t.title LIKE 'Kung Fu Panda%' AND t.id = mi.movie_id AND t.id = mc.movie_id AND t.id = ci.movie_id AND t.id = mk.movie_id AND mc.movie_id = ci.movie_id AND mc.movie_id = mi.movie_id AND mc.movie_id = mk.movie_id AND mi.movie_id = ci.movie_id AND mi.movie_id = mk.movie_id AND ci.movie_id = mk.movie_id AND cn.id = mc.company_id AND it.id = mi.info_type_id AND n.id = ci.person_id AND rt.id = ci.role_id AND n.id = an.person_id AND ci.person_id = an.person_id AND chn.id = ci.person_role_id AND k.id = mk.keyword_id

ScalarOperator.ScalarString: ([dbprove].[job].[movie_info].[info] as [mi].[info] like 'Japan:%201%' OR [dbprove].[job].[movie_info].[info] as [mi].[info] like 'USA:%201%') AND PROBE([Opt_Bitmap1599],[dbprove].[job].[movie_info].[movie_id] as [mi].[movie_id])

([dbprove].[job].[cast_info].[note] as [ci].[note]='(voice)' OR [dbprove].[job].[cast_info].[note] as [ci].[note]='(voice) (uncredited)' OR [dbprove].[job].[cast_info].[note] as [ci].[note]='(voice: English version)' OR [dbprove].[job].[cast_info].[note] as [ci].[note]='(voice: Japanese version)') AND PROBE([Opt_Bitmap1655],[dbprove].[job].[cast_info].[movie_id] as [ci].[movie_id])

[dbprove].[job].[keyword].[keyword] as [k].[keyword]='computer-animated-movie' OR [dbprove].[job].[keyword].[keyword] as [k].[keyword]='hand-to-hand-combat' OR [dbprove].[job].[keyword].[keyword] as [k].[keyword]='hero' OR [dbprove].[job].[keyword].[keyword] as [k].[keyword]='martial-arts'
